old_example: He uses a small professional leather notebook to record every important point during the international marketing meeting recently yesterday morning recently recently recently recently recently.
new_example: He uses a small notebook to record important points today.
new_translation: Anh ấy dùng một cuốn sổ nhỏ để ghi lại các điểm quan trọng.

old_example: The manager noted several technical issues with the new batch of international products during the quality control check.
new_example: The manager noted several technical issues with the products today.
new_translation: Quản lý đã ghi nhận vài lỗi kỹ thuật với các sản phẩm.

old_example: He always carries a small notepad and a pen to jot down ideas for his next novel.
new_example: He carries a small notepad to jot down ideas today.
new_translation: Anh ấy mang theo một cuốn sổ nhỏ để ghi lại ý tưởng hôm nay.

old_example: Please share your international project notes with the rest of the team during the departmental meeting yesterday afternoon recently recently recently recently recently recently recently.
new_example: Please share your project notes with the team today.
new_translation: Vui lòng chia sẻ các ghi chú dự án của bạn với cả nhóm.

old_example: The investigation revealed that nothing was stolen from the office during the break-in last night.
new_example: The investigation revealed that nothing was stolen today.
new_translation: Cuộc điều tra tiết lộ rằng không có gì bị lấy trộm hôm nay.

old_example: The manager gave an official notice to all international employees regarding the new remote work policy yesterday.
new_example: The manager gave a notice regarding the new policy today.
new_translation: Quản lý đã đưa ra thông báo về chính sách mới hôm nay.

old_example: There was a noticeable increase in international sales after the successful launch of the new marketing campaign.
new_example: There was a noticeable increase in sales after the launch today.
new_translation: Có một sự gia tăng rõ rệt doanh số sau đợt ra mắt hôm nay.

old_example: The maintenance crew noticed a small leak in the water pipe and repaired it immediately to prevent further damage.
new_example: The maintenance crew noticed a leak and repaired it today.
new_translation: Đội bảo trì đã nhận thấy một lỗ rò và đã sửa nó hôm nay.

old_example: Official notices regarding the upcoming building renovations are posted on the bulletin board in the lobby.
new_example: Official notices are posted on the bulletin board today.
new_translation: Các thông báo chính thức được dán trên bảng tin hôm nay.
